title: BoardFlow Platform Overview
snippet: BoardFlow provides CRDT-based real-time collaboration, PostgreSQL + object storage backend, region pinning and audit log, supporting 120 concurrent editors.

title: BoardFlow GitHub Overview
snippet: BoardFlow has an active community: 7.2k stars, monthly release cadence, median security patch response of 4 days.

title: CanvasGrid Platform Overview
snippet: CanvasGrid uses an OT + Redis streams collaboration layer, supports 60 concurrent editors, moderate self-hosting complexity, with the EU data residency plugin still in beta.

title: CanvasGrid GitHub Overview
snippet: CanvasGrid has 4.8k stars, 4 releases in the last 12 months, security patches avg 16 days; upgrades require checking OT worker compatibility.

title: SyncSlate Platform Overview
snippet: SyncSlate uses a single-node relay architecture, max 35 concurrent editors, no region pinning, and no native audit log.

title: SyncSlate GitHub Overview
snippet: SyncSlate has 2.1k stars, 2 releases in the last 12 months, no explicit security patch SLA, slow maintenance cadence.

title: EU Data Residency Whiteboard Cutover Playbook
snippet: Multi-region collaboration tool migration recommendations: store EU data separately in EU object storage; pilot first, then dual-track, then cut over; define rollback triggers and replication strategy.
